challenges.title: Image Carousel with Snap
challenges.description: Create a horizontal image carousel that snaps to each image. Use scroll-snap-type: x mandatory with scroll-snap-align: center. The carousel should have 5 images (use gradient placeholders) and smooth scroll behavior.
challenges.hint: Use display: flex on the carousel container. Each image should be flex: 0 0 80% of the container width. Use scroll-snap-align: center on each item.

starter_code.html:
Slide 1
Slide 2
Slide 3
Slide 4
Slide 5

solution.html:
1
2
3
4
5

challenges.expected_outcome: A horizontal carousel where each slide snaps to the center of the container. Slides are 80% wide, allowing a peek at the previous/next slide.

challenges.title: Full-Screen Presentation Deck
challenges.description: Build a full-screen presentation deck with vertical scroll snap. Each slide should fill the viewport and snap to the start. Include a progress indicator (dots or progress bar) that updates as the user navigates. Account for a fixed navigation bar at the top.
challenges.hint: Use scroll-snap-type: y mandatory on the container. For the fixed header offset, use scroll-padding-block-start. Use JavaScript IntersectionObserver or scroll event to update the progress indicator.

solution.html:
My Presentation

Introduction

Welcome to this presentation about CSS Scroll Snap

Topic 1: How It Works

Scroll snap uses mandatory and proximity modes

Topic 2: Implementation

Container sets snap-type, children set snap-align

Conclusion

Thank you for watching!

challenges.expected_outcome: A full-screen presentation with 4 slides that snap perfectly into view. The fixed header shows a progress indicator that updates as the user scrolls through slides.

challenges.title: Multi-Section Product Showcase
challenges.description: Build a product showcase page with a horizontal scroll snap container for product categories and a vertical scroll snap container for product details within each category. This nested scroll snap setup should allow users to browse categories horizontally and see products vertically within each category. Include navigation arrows and keyboard support.
challenges.hint: Use two levels of scroll snap: outer horizontal container for categories, inner vertical containers for each category's products. Use scroll-snap-type: x mandatory for the outer container and scroll-snap-type: y proximity for inner containers. Add scroll-snap-stop: always on category boundaries.

challenges.expected_outcome: A nested scroll snap showcase: horizontally swipe between categories (each fills the viewport), vertically scroll through products within each category. Navigation buttons provide category control. Professional, app-like feel.
